description_long: This object is a rectangular stone block with a series of evenly spaced, parallel grooves running across its top surface, creating a striped pattern. The grooves are deep and sharply defined, giving the block a distinctive, industrial appearance. The sides of the block are smooth and solid, with a matte black finish that contrasts with the lighter, marbled texture of the grooved top. The block appears dense and heavy, likely made from a solid stone material such as granite or marble. Its proportions suggest it is designed to serve as a barrier or obstacle in an urban environment, possibly to control pedestrian or vehicular movement. There are no visible markings, engravings, or signs of significant weathering on the surfaces.
description: A heavy, rectangular stone block with deep, parallel grooves on its top surface and smooth, solid black sides. The top has a marbled, striped appearance, giving it an industrial and robust look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the striped, grooved top surface and the solid, smooth front face.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth and spacing of the grooves, with the marbled texture more visible.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the striped grooves and solid back face.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the deep grooves and marbled top pattern.
attribute_location_context: urban sidewalk or plaza as a barrier or seating element
attribute_installation_method: set in concrete or on a prepared foundation
attribute_weathering_pattern: No visible weathering; surfaces appear clean and well-maintained with sharp groove edges.
attribute_integration_with_surrounding_s: isolated or aligned in a row with similar blocks
